violations.text: Handwashing sink in the employees break room is lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the (food and beverage storage shelves and fans in the walk in cooler) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
Outside dumpster area observed with an accumulation of foliage and other debris. Refuse must be kept clean as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

The floors in the walk in cooler and upstairs storage room have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
